name: Debyani Saha
text:
I had the pleasure and privilege of knowing her more closely during my treatment for Endometrial Cancer at CNCI. I must admit that I have complete faith in her and trust her blindly.

It is not just her expertise, but also her immense knowledge and remarkable ability to put patients at ease. With her ever-smiling demeanor, she explains every condition with such transparency and clarity that one instantly feels connected and reassured.
For patients going through such critical health challenges, feeling connected to their doctor is invaluable, and she ensures that every patient experiences exactly that. She is always available whenever I have even the slightest concern about my health and responds almost immediately.
I truly could not have asked for more.
They say doctors are like God, and I wholeheartedly agree. But for me, she is my GOAT — the Greatest of All Time.

name: Payel Chakraborty
text:
Best Doctor I have ever seen.
She is the angel for me…
Saved my mother life and my trust…
I am thankful to her as well CNCI Hospital where my mother treated very well.
